name: Lyn
desc: A young girl from the Lorca tribe. Stouthhearted and kind.

name: Sain
desc: A knight in service to house Caelin. A bit of a scoundrel.

name: Kent
desc: A knight in service to house Caelin. Virtuous to a fault.

name: Wil
desc: A youth from Pherae, in the Lycian League. Very social.

name: Dorcas
desc: A man from a small village in Bern. Fights for his wife.

name: Florina
desc: A pegasus knight earning her title. A friend of Lyn’s.

name: Rath
desc: A young hired sword from the Kutolah tribe.

name: Erk
desc: A young lady of Frelia. She is both cheery and sociable.

name: Wallace
desc: A retired knight of Caelin. Constantly testing himself.

name: Eagler
desc: Knight Commander of Caelin

name: Nils
desc: A bard possessing arcane powers. Brother of Ninian.

name: Eliwood
desc: Marquess Pherae’s young son. Just and honourable.

name: Marcus
desc: A paladin serving House Pherae. A skilled veteran.

name: Lowen
desc: A knight in service to House Pherae. A fresh recruit.

name: Rebecca
desc: A youth from Pherae. Very helpful and bright.

name: Bartre
desc: One of Eliwood’s guardsmen. Duty is everything to him.

name: Hector
desc: Marquess Ostia’s younger brother. Reckless, but loyal.

name: Oswin
desc: A knight in service to House Ostia. Hector’s sworn man.

name: Serra
desc: A cleric in service to House Ostia. Headstrong and bold.

name: Matthew
desc: A cheery thief. His casual demeanor belies his skill.

name: Guy
desc: A youth from Sacae. Yearns to be a swordmaster.

name: Merlinus
desc: A traveling merchant. Timid and easily frightened.

name: Dart
desc: A steadfast and honourable cavalier in sworn service to Renais.

name: Priscilla
desc: A young girl from a small village in Grado. She is honest and sincere.

name: Raven
desc: The prince of Frelia. He’s brash and arrogant, but good at heart.

name: Lucius
desc: A mercenary leader from Jehanna. He's better known as the Desert Tiger.

name: Isadora
desc: A beautiful and charming dancer from Jehanna.

name: Batta
desc: An aloof sword fighter from Jehanna. She’s known as the Crimson Flash.

name: Glass
desc: A young woman from Rausten. She fights for justice and honour.

name: Erik
desc: A berserker from Rausten. He’s a hearty man with a thirst for life.

name: Legault
desc: A sage from the village Caer Pelyn. He’s Ewan’s solemn, but kind, teacher.

name: Ninian
desc: A sage-in-training from Jehanna. He reveres his teacher, Saleh.

name: Heath
desc: A wyvern knight of Grado. A gentle man, but a ferocious warrior.

name: Karla
desc: A lazy, greedy, but exceptional fighter from the Republic of Carcino.

name: Zealot
desc: A courageous general in Grado’s army. He’s better known as Obsidian.

name: Lyon
desc: The prince of Grado. The Dark Stone is slowly corrupting his body.
